headline: SanDisk wins big BofA target upgrade as new supply deals shore up earnings visibility
summary: SanDisk (NASDAQ:SNDK) has won a higher price target from Bank of America, with the bank lifting its objective to $2,100 from $1,550 on the back of robust NAND demand, favourable pricing trends, and a new wave of long-term supply agreements. At BofA's 2026 Global Technology Conference in San...

headline: Where the Stock Market Goes Next
summary: Wall Street can’t agree on where it is heading next.  Savita Subramanian, head of U.S. equity strategy at  Bank of America  and a broader market skeptic during much of the tech-paced rally that began in late March, thinks the easy market gains might be behind us.  Monday’s recovery comes after Wall Street last week faced its sternest test in months, with tech leading a broader market tumble tied to accelerating bets on a Federal Reserve rate hike and the backdrop of increasing tensions in the U.S. war with Iran.

headline: How The JFrog (FROG) Story Is Shifting With AI Cloud And Security Expectations
summary: JFrog’s fair value estimate has been adjusted slightly, moving from US$79.45 to US$80.75, prompting investors to recheck how the stock is being framed in current research. Street commentary ties these shifts to differing views on how AI driven software development, cloud adoption, and software supply chain security could influence JFrog’s execution and long term pricing power. As you read on, you will see how to track these changing assumptions and what to watch as the narrative continues to...

headline: Big Banks Eye Tokenized Deposits as Stablecoin Competition Heats Up
summary: Major banks like JPM, BAC, C and WFC plan a tokenized deposit network by 2027, aiming to counter stablecoins with blockchain-based, 24/7 payments.

headline: Further ~2% downside in Nasdaq could trigger broader CTA unwinds, BofA warns
summary: Investing.com -- Friday's sharp Nasdaq selloff has likely begun a more coordinated unwind in systematic equity positioning, and another 2% decline could trigger broader deleveraging, Bank of America warned.
